rulings.Case Title: ROMEO E. MERCADO et al VS. KENINGTON LTD, INC. et al

rulings.Case Title: MONTEJANO ARACELY RODRIGUEZ VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Aracely Montejano Rodriguez'S Motion To Postpone A Non Judicial Foreclosure
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 9, 2011, line 10. Plaintiff Aracely Montejano Rodriguez's Motion to Postpone a non-Judicial Foreclosure. Grant. Motion to Postpone opposing party failed to counter with competent evidence i.e. California declaration is not an irrebuttable presumption and counsel's declaration not of personal knowledge. Sale postponed until Civil Code 2923.5 compliance. (501/REQ)
